title: onosma malatyana
intro: Onosma malatyana, also known as Malatya onosma, is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae, native to Turkey and the Middle East. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Onosma malatyana include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and exhibiting potential anticancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
